dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block H Air Cargo Security and Screening Matrix
purpose: Mock/reference security status matrix and jurisdiction security rules for Cortex air-mode readiness checks.
legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Aviation security rules are jurisdiction-, carrier-, station-, route-, commodity-, shipper-, and threat-level dependent. Final operational validation must come from carrier/station/security authority.
integration_note: Run Block H after Blocks B, C, D, F and before final readiness. Passenger aircraft routing requires passenger-eligible security status; EU-bound third-country cargo requires ACC3/secure supply-chain validation; PLACI lanes require complete advance cargo data.
recommended_next_research: Carrier-specific security acceptance rules by station
Known consignor / regulated agent datasets if available
Local screening facility capability for TUN and North Africa
